_doc: Voiceover for section 02 (V1 generation). Reaction in chatbox → pan to canvas → TI + v1Gen placed → favorite-model line names the picked model → camera focuses on TI for skills line + V1 prompt streaming → execute → v1 reveal. No music — added at final stitch.

segments.text: Ah — you want to see me. How cute.
Let me place down a text node first.
And my favorite image model — gpt-image-2.
I have skills tuned for every model. Let me dial this one in.
And here is what comes when I'm given only words.
